# Alloro - Full Context

> Business clarity platform for licensed specialists. Every owner deserves the life they set out to build.

## Mission

Give every business owner the life they set out to build. Alloro sells freedom, not software.

## What Alloro Does

Alloro transforms public business data into actionable intelligence for practice owners. The platform monitors competitive positioning, referral network health, review velocity, and market dynamics across local service markets.

## Product Suite

### Free Referral Base Checkup
A 30-second competitive analysis that shows where a practice ranks in its local market. Inputs: business name and location. Outputs: Business Health Score (composite of three sub-scores), competitor map with real Google Business Profile data, review comparison, and specific findings with dollar-figure impact estimates.

### Intelligence Dashboard
Real-time practice intelligence including:
- Competitive rankings tracked weekly with position change alerts
- Referral network mapping with drift detection (when a referral source stops sending)
- Review velocity monitoring with AI-suggested responses
- One Action Card: the single most impactful action for the practice this week

### Monday Intelligence Brief
Weekly email with findings filtered through a biological-economic lens: every finding identifies the core human need at risk and the dollar consequence at 30, 90, and 365 days.

### PatientPath / ClearPath
Practice websites generated from verified Google Business Profile data. SEO-optimized, AEO-ready (Answer Engine Optimization), with structured data markup.

### GP Referral Intelligence
For specialists who depend on referrals: maps the referral network, detects when referring providers go dark, and estimates revenue at risk from each change.

## Supported Verticals

Alloro uses universal language in its core platform with vertical-specific vocabulary configs:
- Endodontics
- Orthodontics
- General Dentistry
- Chiropractic
- Physical Therapy
- Optometry
- Veterinary
- Legal (Law Firms)
- Financial Advisory (CPAs, Financial Advisors)

## Competitive Intelligence

Alloro tracks competitors using live Google Business Profile data, including:
- Star ratings and review counts
- Review velocity (rate of new reviews)
- Ranking positions for specialty + city combinations
- Website presence and SEO signals

## Data Sources

All intelligence is derived from publicly available data:
- Google Business Profile (ratings, reviews, business info)
- Google Places API (competitor discovery, market density)
- Public website analysis (SEO signals, content patterns)

No patient data is collected or processed. No PII is stored in analytics. Behavioral events track product usage patterns only.

## Technology

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL
- AI: Claude API for conversational support (CS Agent), content generation, and intelligence analysis
- Infrastructure: AWS EC2, managed PostgreSQL

## Heroes & Founders Foundation

Alloro's nonprofit arm, launching January 2027. Two programs:

**Heroes Initiative:** For veterans who transitioned from military service to business ownership. These are people who chose service first, then built something of their own. The initiative provides free access to Alloro's intelligence platform, helping veteran-owned practices compete on equal footing.

**Founders Initiative:** For first-generation business owners who had no family playbook, no inherited network, no safety net. They built from scratch. The initiative provides mentorship connections and platform access.

**RISE Scholars:** Selected applicants receive free Alloro accounts, onboarding support, and recognition in the Heroes & Founders community. Application includes practice details, veteran status (for Heroes), and a brief story of their journey.

- Foundation homepage: https://getalloro.com/foundation
- Heroes Initiative: https://getalloro.com/foundation/heroes
- Founders Initiative: https://getalloro.com/foundation/founders
- Apply: https://getalloro.com/foundation/apply

## Company

Founded by Corey Wise. Based in the United States. Built for licensed specialists who trained for years in a craft they love, bought a business to have freedom, and discovered they had bought a second job.

- Website: https://getalloro.com
